AdminPortal.style: Glassmorphism overlay with deep blur (40px). Executive dashboard aesthetic.
AdminPortal.interaction: Framer Motion scale and fade entries.

AppTopbar.style: Sticky glass header with dynamic tool teleportation.
AppTopbar.logic: ResizeObserver monitors overflow and teleports tools to Sidebar.

Sidebar.style: Warm oatmeal background with subtle inner shadows and clean typography.

StatusToggle.classes: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-bg-tertiary border border-glass-border
